Earll M. Pott, Esq., counsel for Defendants contested the Court's tentative ruling, but did not make an appearnce argue this matter. The motion is not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HINSHAW & CULBERTSON LLP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions

Defendants Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP's motion to compel further production of documents from Plaintiff Texas Insurance Company is DENIED, and Defendants are ordered to pay sanctions of $1,585 within 30 days of entry of this order. (see word minutes for complete ruling)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/BZ)
